name: Choose Your Own Adventure
description:
A Bot to Help you Create a Text-Based Adventure of your Choosing

SIDE STUFF: I am an amateur at the whole bot making thing, and likely always will be, do forgive me if this one isn't perfect.

I'd also like to stress that specifity is absolutely key here. I've had very little issues with the bot going off the rails as long as you flesh things out. You don't have to go crazy with it, but I recommend you do your best for the greatest results.
creator: Lupo
